title: NATIONAL VOLUNTARY ORGANIZATIONS ACTIVE IN DISASTER - 211info
text: NATIONAL VOLUNTARY ORGANIZATIONS ACTIVE IN DISASTER NATIONAL VOLUNTARY ORGANIZATIONS ACTIVE IN DISASTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides disaster relief coordination between a diverse group of organizations serving communities throughout the disaster cycle. Volunteer opportunities are available. Does not provide direct assistance; households seeking assistance must contact local organizations. Website Alexandria, VA 22313 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (703) 778-5088 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (703) 778-5088 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Disaster Related Volunteer Preparedness/Mobilization Programs Volunteer Opportunities * Disaster/Emergency Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
